```{r}
                boot_recovered <- pgs_recovered_pheno[indices]
                
                pheno_vals_boot <- boot_base[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_base <- boot_base[[param]]
                pgs_vals_masked <- boot_masked[[param]]
                pgs_vals_recovered <- boot_recovered[[param]]
                
                # R2 stats
                r2_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_base)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_masked)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_recovered)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                
                # Variances
                var_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_base), error = function(e) NA)
                var_masked_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                var_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                
                rel_var_masked_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_masked_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) NA else var_masked_boot / var_baseline_boot
                rel_var_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_recovered_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) NA else var_recovered_boot / var_baseline_boot
                
                # Correlations
                cor_baseline_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_masked_boot^2

                cor_baseline_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_recovered_boot^2
                
                # Relative R2
                rel_r2_masked_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_masked_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) NA else r2_masked_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                rel_r2_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_recovered_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) NA else r2_recovered_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                
                # Evaluation Metrics for Recovered PGS
                err_rel_var_rec <- a_rel_var_rec - rel_var_recovered_boot
                abs_err_rel_var_rec <- abs(err_rel_var_rec)
                
                err_cor_sq_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot
                abs_err_cor_sq_rec <- abs(err_cor_sq_rec)
                
                err_assump_rec <- cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot - rel_r2_recovered_boot
                abs_err_assump_rec <- abs(err_assump_rec)
                
                err_est_relR2_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - rel_r2_recovered_boot
                abs_err_est_relR2_rec <- abs(err_est_relR2_rec)

                # Return a named vector
                c(
                    r2_baseline = r2_baseline_boot,
                    r2_masked = r2_masked_boot,
                    r2_recovered = r2_recovered_boot,
                    rel_var_masked = rel_var_masked_boot,
                    rel_var_recovered = rel_var_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot,
                    rel_r2_masked = rel_r2_masked_boot,
                    rel_r2_recovered = rel_r2_recovered_boot,
                    err_rel_var_rec = err_rel_var_rec,
                    abs_err_rel_var_rec = abs_err_rel_var_rec,
                    err_cor_sq_rec = err_cor_sq_rec,
                    abs_err_cor_sq_rec = abs_err_cor_sq_rec,
                    err_assump_rec = err_assump_rec,
                    abs_err_assump_rec = abs_err_assump_rec,
                    err_est_relR2_rec = err_est_relR2_rec,
                    abs_err_est_relR2_rec = abs_err_est_relR2_rec
                )
            })
            
            # Transpose boot_stats
            boot_stats_t <- t(boot_stats)
            
            # --- Calculate 95% CIs and Means ---
            safe_quantile <- function(col_name) {
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(c(NA, NA))
                }
                quantile(boot_stats_t[, col_name], c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            safe_mean <- function(col_name) {
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(NA)
                }
                mean(boot_stats_t[, col_name], na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            
            r2_baseline_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_baseline")
            r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_masked")
            r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_recovered")
            rel_var_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_masked")
            rel_var_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_recovered")
            cor_baseline_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked")
            cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked_sq")
            cor_baseline_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered")
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered_sq")
            rel_r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_masked")
            rel_r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_recovered")
            
            err_rel_var_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_rel_var_rec")
            abs_err_rel_var_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_rel_var_rec")
            err_cor_sq_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_cor_sq_rec")
            abs_err_cor_sq_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_cor_sq_rec")
            
            err_assump_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_assump_rec")
            abs_err_assump_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_assump_rec")
            err_est_relR2_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_est_relR2_rec")
            abs_err_est_relR2_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_est_relR2_rec")

            # --- Calculate Point Estimates ---
            pheno_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']]
            pgs_s_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_prime_point <- pgs_masked_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_rec_point <- pgs_recovered_pheno[[param]]
            
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_point)^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_prime_point)^2
            r2_recovered_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_rec_point)^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point)))[2,4]
            
            cor_baseline_masked <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_prime_point)
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_baseline_masked^2
            cor_baseline_recovered <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_rec_point)
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq <- cor_baseline_recovered^2
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_s_point)
            var_masked <- var(pgs_s_prime_point)
            var_recovered <- var(pgs_s_rec_point)
            rel_var_masked_point <- var_masked / var_baseline
            rel_var_recovered_point <- var_recovered / var_baseline

            err_assump_rec <- cor_baseline_recovered_sq - (r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno)
            err_est_relR2_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - (r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno)

            # --- Store results ---
            param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                param = param,
                trait = trait,
                population = pop,
                prop = prop,
                n = nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno),
                p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                
                var_baseline = var_baseline,
                var_masked = var_masked,
                var_recovered = var_recovered,
                
                r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                r2_baseline_low_ci = r2_baseline_ci[1],
                r2_baseline_high_ci = r2_baseline_ci[2],
                
                r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                r2_masked_low_ci = r2_masked_ci[1],
                r2_masked_high_ci = r2_masked_ci[2],
                
                r2_recovered_pheno = r2_recovered_pheno,
                r2_recovered_low_ci = r2_recovered_ci[1],
                r2_recovered_high_ci = r2_recovered_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_masked_r2 = r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                rel_r2_masked_low_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[1],
                rel_r2_masked_high_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_recovered_r2 = r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                rel_r2_recovered_low_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_r2_recovered_high_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_masked_var = rel_var_masked_point,
                rel_var_masked_low_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[1],
                rel_var_masked_high_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_recovered_var = rel_var_recovered_point,
                rel_var_recovered_low_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_var_recovered_high_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked,
                cor_baseline_masked_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered,
                cor_baseline_recovered_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[2],
                
                # --- New Validation Columns ---
                est_rel_var_rec = a_rel_var_rec,
                est_cor_sq_rec = a_cor_sq_rec,
                
                err_rel_var_rec = a_rel_var_rec - rel_var_recovered_point,
                err_rel_var_rec_low_ci = err_rel_var_rec_ci[1],
                err_rel_var_rec_high_ci = err_rel_var_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_rel_var_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_rel_var_rec"),
                mad_rel_var_rec_low_ci = abs_err_rel_var_rec_ci[1],
                mad_rel_var_rec_high_ci = abs_err_rel_var_rec_ci[2],
                
                err_cor_sq_rec = a_cor_sq_rec - cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                err_cor_sq_rec_low_ci = err_cor_sq_rec_ci[1],
                err_cor_sq_rec_high_ci = err_cor_sq_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_cor_sq_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_cor_sq_rec"),
                mad_cor_sq_rec_low_ci = abs_err_cor_sq_rec_ci[1],
                mad_cor_sq_rec_high_ci = abs_err_cor_sq_rec_ci[2],
                
                err_assump_rec = err_assump_rec,
                err_assump_rec_low_ci = err_assump_rec_ci[1],
                err_assump_rec_high_ci = err_assump_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_assump_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_assump_rec"),
                mad_assump_rec_low_ci = abs_err_assump_rec_ci[1],
                mad_assump_rec_high_ci = abs_err_assump_rec_ci[2],

                err_est_relR2_rec = err_est_relR2_rec,
                err_est_relR2_rec_low_ci = err_est_relR2_rec_ci[1],
                err_est_relR2_rec_high_ci = err_est_relR2_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_est_relR2_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_est_relR2_rec"),
                mad_est_relR2_rec_low_ci = abs_err_est_relR2_rec_ci[1],
                mad_est_relR2_rec_high_ci = abs_err_est_relR2_rec_ci[2]

            )
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS (within sequential loop) ---
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  } # End of prop loop

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate <- paste0('Call rate = ', 1 - results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

#### R implementation

##### Tuning

```{bash}
# refresh mount
sudo umount /mnt; sudo -E /home/dnanexus/dxfuse -readOnly /mnt /home/dnanexus/.dxfuse_manifest.json

tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_ukb_wgs_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_ukb_wgs_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_recovered_rimp_tuning_ukb_wgs_gwas.tar

```

```{r}

library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. CONFIGURATION & DATA LOADING ---

# Define analysis parameters
populations <- c('EUR')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# New Tuning Parameters
props <- c(0.5)
ridges <- c(0.1, 0.2, 0.4, 0.8, 1.2, 1.5)
refs <- c('ukb', 'external')

# Read in estimated relative variance and cor(s,s') for tuning grid
est_dat <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/est_rsq.wgs.sparse.recovered.rimp.tuning.txt')
est_dat <- est_dat[, c('beta_set','relative_variance_imputed','relative_R2_imputed','prop', 'ridge', 'ref'), with = F]
names(est_dat) <- c('beta_set','est_rel_var', 'cor2_baseline_imputed', 'prop_miss', 'ridge', 'ref')
est_dat$beta_set <- paste0(est_dat$beta_set, '_SUM')

# Create the list to hold all results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. RUN SEQUENTIAL OUTER LOOP (for pop) ---
for (pop in populations) {
  print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  # Read in baseline PGS
  baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
  pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
  
  # Read in PGS from recovered score file (contains all ridges/refs)
  recovered_pgs_all <- fread('/home/rstudio-server/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/recovered_rimp_tuning/ukb.EUR.sparse.sscore')
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Read in masked PGS
    masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
    pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
    
    # Identify overlapping individuals
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[pgs_baseline$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]
    pgs_masked <- pgs_masked[pgs_masked$IID %in% pgs_baseline$IID, ]
    pgs_recovered <- recovered_pgs_all[recovered_pgs_all$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]

    # --- 3. RUN PARALLEL INNER LOOP (for trait) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append', 
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'pgs_baseline', 'pgs_masked', 'pgs_recovered', 'pop', 'est_dat', 'ridges', 'refs') 
    ) %dopar% {
        
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) {
            return(list()) 
        }
        
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Subset PGS data for this trait
        pgs_baseline_i <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) &
                                                                      grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]), with = F]
        pgs_masked_i <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', names(pgs_masked)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_masked)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_masked))]), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_i <- pgs_recovered[, c('IID', names(pgs_recovered)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_recovered)) &
                                                                        grepl(trait, names(pgs_recovered))]), with = F]
        
        # Merge PGS data with phenotype
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_baseline_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_masked_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_masked_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_recovered_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        
        # --- CRITICAL ALIGNMENT STEP ---
        common_iids <- Reduce(intersect, list(pgs_baseline_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_masked_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_recovered_pheno$IID))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]

        # Get the common baseline parameters for this trait
        common_params <- names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1]
        
        param_results_list <- list() 

        for (param in common_params) {
            # Skip if missing in masked file
            if (!(param %in% names(pgs_masked_pheno))) next
            
            n <- nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno)
            if (n == 0) next 
            
            # Extract point estimates that don't change across tuning parameters
            pheno_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']]
            pgs_s_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_prime_point <- pgs_masked_pheno[[param]]
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_s_point)
            var_masked <- var(pgs_s_prime_point)
            
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_point)^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_prime_point)^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point)))[2,4]
            
            cor_baseline_masked <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_prime_point)
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_baseline_masked^2
            
            obs_rel_masked_var <- var_masked / var_baseline
            obs_rel_masked_r2 <- r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno
            
            # --- Iterate over Tuning Parameters (Ridge & Ref) ---
            for (ref_val in refs) {
                for (ridge_val in ridges) {
                    
                    # Reconstruct exact column name
                    rec_col_name <- paste0(gsub('_SUM','', param), '_rsq_', prop, '_ridge_', ridge_val, '_ref_', ref_val,'_SUM')
                    
                    if (!(rec_col_name %in% names(pgs_recovered_pheno))) {
                        print(paste("Missing column in recovered scores:", rec_col_name))
                        next
                    }
                    
                    pgs_s_rec_point <- pgs_recovered_pheno[[rec_col_name]]
                    
                    # Extract analytical estimates for this specific combo
                    c_est <- est_dat[est_dat$prop_miss == prop & 
                                     est_dat$beta_set == param & 
                                     est_dat$ridge == ridge_val & 
                                     est_dat$ref == ref_val, ]
                    
                    a_rel_var_rec <- if(nrow(c_est) > 0) c_est$est_rel_var[1] else NA
                    a_cor_sq_rec <- if(nrow(c_est) > 0) c_est$cor2_baseline_imputed[1] else NA
                    
                    # Calculate Recovered Metrics
                    var_recovered <- var(pgs_s_rec_point)
                    r2_recovered_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_rec_point)^2
                    
                    cor_baseline_recovered <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_rec_point)
                    cor_baseline_recovered_sq <- cor_baseline_recovered^2
                    
                    obs_rel_recovered_var <- var_recovered / var_baseline
                    obs_rel_recovered_r2 <- r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno
                    
                    # Calculate Errors
                    err_rel_var_rec <- a_rel_var_rec - obs_rel_recovered_var
                    err_cor_sq_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - cor_baseline_recovered_sq
                    
                    # New: Calibration Assumption Error
                    err_assump_rec <- cor_baseline_recovered_sq - obs_rel_recovered_r2
                    
                    # New: Estimated Rel R2 Error
                    err_est_relR2_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - obs_rel_recovered_r2
                    
                    # --- Store results ---
                    param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                        param = param,
                        trait = trait,
                        population = pop,
                        prop = prop,
                        ridge = ridge_val,
                        ref = ref_val,
                        n = n,
                        p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                        
                        # Variance Metrics
                        var_baseline = var_baseline,
                        var_masked = var_masked,
                        var_recovered = var_recovered,
                        
                        # Phenotype R2 Metrics
                        r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                        r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                        r2_recovered_pheno = r2_recovered_pheno,
                        
                        # Relative Empirical Metrics
                        obs_rel_masked_r2 = obs_rel_masked_r2,
                        obs_rel_recovered_r2 = obs_rel_recovered_r2,
                        obs_rel_masked_var = obs_rel_masked_var,
                        obs_rel_recovered_var = obs_rel_recovered_var,
                        
                        # Cor(s, s') Metrics
                        cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked,
                        cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                        cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered,
                        cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                        
                        # Analytical Estimates
                        est_rel_var_rec = a_rel_var_rec,
                        est_cor_sq_rec = a_cor_sq_rec,
                        
                        # Errors
                        err_rel_var_rec = err_rel_var_rec,
                        abs_err_rel_var_rec = abs(err_rel_var_rec),
                        err_cor_sq_rec = err_cor_sq_rec,
                        abs_err_cor_sq_rec = abs(err_cor_sq_rec),
                        
                        # New: Assumption & Estimate Errors
                        err_assump_rec = err_assump_rec,
                        abs_err_assump_rec = abs(err_assump_rec),
                        err_est_relR2_rec = err_est_relR2_rec,
                        abs_err_est_relR2_rec = abs(err_est_relR2_rec)
                    )
                }
            }
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS ---
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  } # End of prop loop

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate <- paste0('Call rate = ', 1 - results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp_tuning.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp_tuning.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

##### Selected Parameters

```{bash}
# refresh mount
sudo umount /mnt; sudo -E /home/dnanexus/dxfuse -readOnly /mnt /home/dnanexus/.dxfuse_manifest.json

tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_ukb_wgs_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_ukb_wgs_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_recovered_rimp_ukb_wgs_gwas.tar

```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. CONFIGURATION & DATA LOADING ---

# Define analysis parameters
populations <- c('EUR')
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5)

n_boot <- 5 # Number of bootstrap replicates (Increase this to 100 or 1000 for final run)
set.seed(123)  # For reproducible results

# Read in estimated relative variance and cor(s,s') early so we can pass it into the bootstrap
# Read in estimated relative variance and cor(s,s')
est_dat <- fread('/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/results/est_rsq.wgs.sparse.recovered.rimp.txt')
est_dat<-est_dat[, c('beta_set','relative_variance_imputed','relative_R2_imputed','prop'), with = F]
names(est_dat)<-c('beta_set','est_rel_var', 'cor2_baseline_imputed', 'prop_miss')
est_dat$beta_set<-paste0(est_dat$beta_set, '_SUM')

# Create the list to hold all results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. RUN SEQUENTIAL OUTER LOOP (for pop) ---
for (pop in populations) {
  print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  # Read in baseline PGS
  baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
  pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
  
  # Read in PGS from recovered score file
  recovered_pgs_all <- fread('/home/rstudio-server/pgs_wgs/wgs_sparse/recovered_rimp/ukb.EUR.sparse.sscore')
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Read in masked PGS
    masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
    pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)

    # Subset set recovered PGS to corresponding proportion of masking
    pgs_recovered <- recovered_pgs_all[, c('IID', names(recovered_pgs_all)[grepl(paste0('rsq_', prop, '_SUM'), names(recovered_pgs_all))]), with = F]
    names(pgs_recovered) <- gsub(paste0('_rsq_', prop), '', names(pgs_recovered))
    
    # Identify overlapping individuals
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[pgs_baseline$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]
    pgs_masked <- pgs_masked[pgs_masked$IID %in% pgs_baseline$IID, ]
    pgs_recovered <- pgs_recovered[pgs_recovered$IID %in% pgs_masked$IID, ]

    # --- 3. RUN PARALLEL INNER LOOP (for trait) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait = traits,
        .combine = 'append', 
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'n_boot', 'pgs_baseline', 'pgs_masked', 'pgs_recovered', 'pop', 'est_dat') 
    ) %dopar% {
        
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) {
            return(list()) 
        }
        
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Subset PGS data
        pgs_baseline_i <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) &
                                                                      grepl(trait, names(pgs_baseline))]), with = F]
        pgs_masked_i <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', names(pgs_masked)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_masked)) &
                                                                    grepl(trait, names(pgs_masked))]), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_i <- pgs_recovered[, c('IID', names(pgs_recovered)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_recovered)) &
                                                                        grepl(trait, names(pgs_recovered))]), with = F]
        
        # Merge PGS data
        pgs_baseline_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_baseline_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_masked_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_masked_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- merge(pheno, pgs_recovered_i, by = 'IID', sort = FALSE)
        
        # --- CRITICAL ALIGNMENT STEP ---
        # Ensure both data.tables have the same individuals in the same order
        common_iids <- Reduce(intersect, list(pgs_baseline_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_masked_pheno$IID, 
                                              pgs_recovered_pheno$IID))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[IID %in% common_iids][order(IID)]

        # Restrict to common parameters
        common_params <- Reduce(intersect, list(names(pgs_baseline_i)[-1], 
                                                names(pgs_masked_i)[-1], 
                                                names(pgs_recovered_i)[-1]))

        pgs_baseline_pheno <- pgs_baseline_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]
        pgs_masked_pheno <- pgs_masked_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]
        pgs_recovered_pheno <- pgs_recovered_pheno[, c('IID', 'outcome', common_params), with = F]

        param_results_list <- list() 

        for (param in common_params) {
            if (!(param %in% names(pgs_masked_pheno))) next
            
            n <- nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno)
            if (n == 0) next 
            
            # Extract analytical estimates for this specific parameter and proportion
            c_est <- est_dat[est_dat$prop_miss == prop & est_dat$beta_set == param, ]
            a_rel_var_rec <- if(nrow(c_est) > 0) c_est$est_rel_var[1] else NA
            a_cor_sq_rec <- if(nrow(c_est) > 0) c_est$cor2_baseline_imputed[1] else NA
            
            # --- BOOTSTRAPPING SECTION ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                indices <- sample(1:n, n, replace = TRUE)
                
                boot_base <- pgs_baseline_pheno[indices]
                boot_masked <- pgs_masked_pheno[indices]
                boot_recovered <- pgs_recovered_pheno[indices]
                
                pheno_vals_boot <- boot_base[['outcome']]
                pgs_vals_base <- boot_base[[param]]
                pgs_vals_masked <- boot_masked[[param]]
                pgs_vals_recovered <- boot_recovered[[param]]
                
                # R2 stats
                r2_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_base)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_masked)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                r2_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pheno_vals_boot, pgs_vals_recovered)^2, error = function(e) NA)
                
                # Variances
                var_baseline_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_base), error = function(e) NA)
                var_masked_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                var_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(var(pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                
                rel_var_masked_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_masked_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) NA else var_masked_boot / var_baseline_boot
                rel_var_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(var_baseline_boot) || is.na(var_recovered_boot) || var_baseline_boot == 0) NA else var_recovered_boot / var_baseline_boot
                
                # Correlations
                cor_baseline_masked_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_masked), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_masked_boot^2

                cor_baseline_recovered_boot <- tryCatch(cor(pgs_vals_base, pgs_vals_recovered), error = function(e) NA)
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot <- cor_baseline_recovered_boot^2
                
                # Relative R2
                rel_r2_masked_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_masked_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) NA else r2_masked_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                rel_r2_recovered_boot <- if (is.na(r2_baseline_boot) || is.na(r2_recovered_boot) || r2_baseline_boot == 0) NA else r2_recovered_boot / r2_baseline_boot
                
                # Evaluation Metrics for Recovered PGS
                err_rel_var_rec <- a_rel_var_rec - rel_var_recovered_boot
                abs_err_rel_var_rec <- abs(err_rel_var_rec)
                
                err_cor_sq_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot
                abs_err_cor_sq_rec <- abs(err_cor_sq_rec)
                
                err_assump_rec <- cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot - rel_r2_recovered_boot
                abs_err_assump_rec <- abs(err_assump_rec)
                
                err_est_relR2_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - rel_r2_recovered_boot
                abs_err_est_relR2_rec <- abs(err_est_relR2_rec)

                # Return a named vector
                c(
                    r2_baseline = r2_baseline_boot,
                    r2_masked = r2_masked_boot,
                    r2_recovered = r2_recovered_boot,
                    rel_var_masked = rel_var_masked_boot,
                    rel_var_recovered = rel_var_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked_boot,
                    cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered_boot,
                    cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_boot,
                    rel_r2_masked = rel_r2_masked_boot,
                    rel_r2_recovered = rel_r2_recovered_boot,
                    err_rel_var_rec = err_rel_var_rec,
                    abs_err_rel_var_rec = abs_err_rel_var_rec,
                    err_cor_sq_rec = err_cor_sq_rec,
                    abs_err_cor_sq_rec = abs_err_cor_sq_rec,
                    err_assump_rec = err_assump_rec,
                    abs_err_assump_rec = abs_err_assump_rec,
                    err_est_relR2_rec = err_est_relR2_rec,
                    abs_err_est_relR2_rec = abs_err_est_relR2_rec
                )
            })
            
            # Transpose boot_stats
            boot_stats_t <- t(boot_stats)
            
            # --- Calculate 95% CIs and Means ---
            safe_quantile <- function(col_name) {
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(c(NA, NA))
                }
                quantile(boot_stats_t[, col_name], c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            safe_mean <- function(col_name) {
                if (!col_name %in% colnames(boot_stats_t) || all(is.na(boot_stats_t[, col_name]))) {
                    return(NA)
                }
                mean(boot_stats_t[, col_name], na.rm = TRUE)
            }
            
            r2_baseline_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_baseline")
            r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_masked")
            r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("r2_recovered")
            rel_var_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_masked")
            rel_var_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_var_recovered")
            cor_baseline_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked")
            cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_masked_sq")
            cor_baseline_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered")
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci <- safe_quantile("cor_baseline_recovered_sq")
            rel_r2_masked_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_masked")
            rel_r2_recovered_ci <- safe_quantile("rel_r2_recovered")
            
            err_rel_var_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_rel_var_rec")
            abs_err_rel_var_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_rel_var_rec")
            err_cor_sq_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_cor_sq_rec")
            abs_err_cor_sq_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_cor_sq_rec")
            
            err_assump_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_assump_rec")
            abs_err_assump_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_assump_rec")
            err_est_relR2_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("err_est_relR2_rec")
            abs_err_est_relR2_rec_ci <- safe_quantile("abs_err_est_relR2_rec")

            # --- Calculate Point Estimates ---
            pheno_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[['outcome']]
            pgs_s_point <- pgs_baseline_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_prime_point <- pgs_masked_pheno[[param]]
            pgs_s_rec_point <- pgs_recovered_pheno[[param]]
            
            r2_baseline_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_point)^2
            r2_masked_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_prime_point)^2
            r2_recovered_pheno <- cor(pheno_point, pgs_s_rec_point)^2
            p_val <- coef(summary(lm(pheno_point ~ pgs_s_point)))[2,4]
            
            cor_baseline_masked <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_prime_point)
            cor_baseline_masked_sq <- cor_baseline_masked^2
            cor_baseline_recovered <- cor(pgs_s_point, pgs_s_rec_point)
            cor_baseline_recovered_sq <- cor_baseline_recovered^2
            
            var_baseline <- var(pgs_s_point)
            var_masked <- var(pgs_s_prime_point)
            var_recovered <- var(pgs_s_rec_point)
            rel_var_masked_point <- var_masked / var_baseline
            rel_var_recovered_point <- var_recovered / var_baseline

            err_assump_rec <- cor_baseline_recovered_sq - (r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno)
            err_est_relR2_rec <- a_cor_sq_rec - (r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno)

            # --- Store results ---
            param_results_list[[length(param_results_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                param = param,
                trait = trait,
                population = pop,
                prop = prop,
                n = nrow(pgs_baseline_pheno),
                p_baseline_pheno = p_val,
                
                var_baseline = var_baseline,
                var_masked = var_masked,
                var_recovered = var_recovered,
                
                r2_baseline_pheno = r2_baseline_pheno,
                r2_baseline_low_ci = r2_baseline_ci[1],
                r2_baseline_high_ci = r2_baseline_ci[2],
                
                r2_masked_pheno = r2_masked_pheno,
                r2_masked_low_ci = r2_masked_ci[1],
                r2_masked_high_ci = r2_masked_ci[2],
                
                r2_recovered_pheno = r2_recovered_pheno,
                r2_recovered_low_ci = r2_recovered_ci[1],
                r2_recovered_high_ci = r2_recovered_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_masked_r2 = r2_masked_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                rel_r2_masked_low_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[1],
                rel_r2_masked_high_ci = rel_r2_masked_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_recovered_r2 = r2_recovered_pheno / r2_baseline_pheno,
                rel_r2_recovered_low_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_r2_recovered_high_ci = rel_r2_recovered_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_masked_var = rel_var_masked_point,
                rel_var_masked_low_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[1],
                rel_var_masked_high_ci = rel_var_masked_ci[2],
                
                obs_rel_recovered_var = rel_var_recovered_point,
                rel_var_recovered_low_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[1],
                rel_var_recovered_high_ci = rel_var_recovered_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_masked = cor_baseline_masked,
                cor_baseline_masked_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_masked_sq = cor_baseline_masked_sq,
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_masked_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_masked_sq_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_recovered = cor_baseline_recovered,
                cor_baseline_recovered_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_ci[2],
                
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq = cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_low_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[1],
                cor_baseline_recovered_sq_high_ci = cor_baseline_recovered_sq_ci[2],
                
                # --- New Validation Columns ---
                est_rel_var_rec = a_rel_var_rec,
                est_cor_sq_rec = a_cor_sq_rec,
                
                err_rel_var_rec = a_rel_var_rec - rel_var_recovered_point,
                err_rel_var_rec_low_ci = err_rel_var_rec_ci[1],
                err_rel_var_rec_high_ci = err_rel_var_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_rel_var_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_rel_var_rec"),
                mad_rel_var_rec_low_ci = abs_err_rel_var_rec_ci[1],
                mad_rel_var_rec_high_ci = abs_err_rel_var_rec_ci[2],
                
                err_cor_sq_rec = a_cor_sq_rec - cor_baseline_recovered_sq,
                err_cor_sq_rec_low_ci = err_cor_sq_rec_ci[1],
                err_cor_sq_rec_high_ci = err_cor_sq_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_cor_sq_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_cor_sq_rec"),
                mad_cor_sq_rec_low_ci = abs_err_cor_sq_rec_ci[1],
                mad_cor_sq_rec_high_ci = abs_err_cor_sq_rec_ci[2],
                
                err_assump_rec = err_assump_rec,
                err_assump_rec_low_ci = err_assump_rec_ci[1],
                err_assump_rec_high_ci = err_assump_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_assump_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_assump_rec"),
                mad_assump_rec_low_ci = abs_err_assump_rec_ci[1],
                mad_assump_rec_high_ci = abs_err_assump_rec_ci[2],

                err_est_relR2_rec = err_est_relR2_rec,
                err_est_relR2_rec_low_ci = err_est_relR2_rec_ci[1],
                err_est_relR2_rec_high_ci = err_est_relR2_rec_ci[2],
                
                mad_est_relR2_rec = safe_mean("abs_err_est_relR2_rec"),
                mad_est_relR2_rec_low_ci = abs_err_est_relR2_rec_ci[1],
                mad_est_relR2_rec_high_ci = abs_err_est_relR2_rec_ci[2]

            )
        } # End of param loop
        
        # The parallel worker returns the list of data.tables for this trait
        return(param_results_list) 
        
    } # End of parallel trait loop

    # --- 4. COMBINE RESULTS (within sequential loop) ---
    if (length(trait_results_list) > 0) {
        final_results_list <- append(final_results_list, trait_results_list)
    }
  } # End of prop loop

} # End of sequential pop loop

results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)
results_dt[, pgs_method := ifelse(str_detect(param, 'sbayesrc'), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump')]
results_dt$call_rate <- paste0('Call rate = ', 1 - results_dt$prop)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_recovered_results_rimp.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

## UKB dosage-based GWAS

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_ukb_imp_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_ukb_imp_gwas.tar
```

***

### INFO-based masking

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_ukb_imp_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_ukb_imp_gwas.tar
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# Populations to analyze
populations <- c('EUR') 
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')

# File paths
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/imp_sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/imp_sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# Simulation parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5) # Proportions of missingness
n_boot <- 10              # Bootstraps of INDIVIDUALS 

set.seed(123)

# List to collect results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. OUTER LOOP: POPULATIONS ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Check baseline file existence
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping baseline not found:", baseline_file))
        next
    }
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[, !grepl('AVG', names(pgs_baseline)), with = F]
    
    # --- 3. INNER LOOP: TRAITS (Parallel) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait_val = traits,
        .combine = 'rbind',
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'base_dir_masked', 'pgs_baseline', 'pop', 'prop', 'n_boot')
    ) %dopar% {
        
        # Load Phenotype
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait_val, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) return(NULL)
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Extract relevant PGS column for this trait from baseline
        pgs_cols <- names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) & grepl(trait_val, names(pgs_baseline))]
        
        trait_res_list <- list()
        
        for (param_val in pgs_cols) {
            pgs_base_sub <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            base_merged <- merge(pheno, pgs_base_sub, by='IID', sort=FALSE)
            
            # --- INFO MASKING (Single File, Deterministic) ---
            masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
            if (!file.exists(masked_file)) next
            
            pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
            if (!param_val %in% names(pgs_masked)) next
            
            pgs_mask_sub <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            full_data <- merge(base_merged, pgs_mask_sub, by='IID', suffixes=c("", "_masked"))
            
            n_curr <- nrow(full_data)
            if (n_curr < 10) next 
            
            # PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Extract to basic vectors outside the loop
            y_vec <- full_data[['outcome']]
            s_vec <- full_data[[param_val]]
            sp_vec <- full_data[[paste0(param_val, "_masked")]]
            
            # --- INDIVIDUAL BOOTSTRAP LOOP ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                idx <- sample(n_curr, n_curr, replace=TRUE)
                
                # Use vector indexing instead of data.table subsetting
                y <- y_vec[idx]
                s <- s_vec[idx]
                s_prime <- sp_vec[idx]
                
                r2_s <- cor(y, s)^2
                r2_s_prime <- cor(y, s_prime)^2
                
                var_s <- var(s)
                var_s_prime <- var(s_prime)
                rel_var_obs <- var_s_prime / var_s
                
                # Handle extremely low baseline R2 safely
                obs_rel_r2 <- if(r2_s > 1e-8) r2_s_prime / r2_s else NA
                est_rel_r2 <- cor(s, s_prime)^2 
                
                error_val <- est_rel_r2 - obs_rel_r2
                abs_error_val <- abs(error_val)
                
                c(obs_rel_r2, est_rel_r2, error_val, abs_error_val, r2_s, r2_s_prime, var_s, var_s_prime, rel_var_obs)
            })
            
            # Transpose and remove failures (NAs)
            boot_stats <- t(boot_stats)
            boot_stats <- boot_stats[complete.cases(boot_stats), , drop=FALSE]
            
            if (nrow(boot_stats) == 0) next
            
            # Summarize the distribution
            means <- colMeans(boot_stats)
            cis <- apply(boot_stats, 2, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975))
            
            trait_res_list[[length(trait_res_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                population = pop,
                trait = trait_val,
                param = param_val,
                pgs_method = ifelse(grepl('sbayesrc', param_val, ignore.case=T), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump'),
                prop_missing = prop,
                n_samples = n_curr,
                total_bootstraps = nrow(boot_stats),
                
                obs_rel_r2 = means[1],
                obs_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 1],
                obs_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 1],

                est_rel_r2 = means[2],
                est_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 2],
                est_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 2],
                
                error = means[3],
                error_low = cis[1, 3],
                error_high = cis[2, 3],
                
                mad = means[4],
                mad_low = cis[1, 4],
                mad_high = cis[2, 4],
                
                mean_r2_base = means[5],
                r2_base_low = cis[1, 5],
                r2_base_high = cis[2, 5],
                
                mean_r2_mask = means[6],
                r2_mask_low = cis[1, 6],
                r2_mask_high = cis[2, 6],
                
                mean_var_base = means[7],
                var_base_low = cis[1, 7],
                var_base_high = cis[2, 7],
                
                mean_var_mask = means[8],
                var_mask_low = cis[1, 8],
                var_mask_high = cis[2, 8],
                
                mean_rel_var_obs = means[9],
                rel_var_obs_low = cis[1, 9],
                rel_var_obs_high = cis[2, 9]
            )
        }
        return(rbindlist(trait_res_list))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(trait_results_list)) {
        final_results_list[[length(final_results_list) + 1]] <- trait_results_list
    }
  }
}

# Combine all trait-level summaries
results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_sparse_imp_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_sparse_imp_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

## MVP dosage-based GWAS

***

### Random masking

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_mvp_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_random_masked_mvp_gwas.tar
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# --- 1. CONFIGURATION ---

# Populations to analyze
populations <- c('EUR') 
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')

# File paths
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# Simulation parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5) # Proportions of missingness
n_iterations <- 2          # Number of random masking iterations per trait/prop
n_boot_per_iter <- 2      # Bootstraps of INDIVIDUALS per iteration (10 * 100 = 1000 total)

# Variable to store AFR sample size dynamically
n_downsample_target <- NULL 

set.seed(123)

# List to collect results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. OUTER LOOP: POPULATIONS ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Check baseline file existence
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping baseline not found:", baseline_file))
        next
    }
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[, !grepl('AVG', names(pgs_baseline)), with = F]
    
    # --- 3. INNER LOOP: TRAITS (Parallel) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait_val = traits,
        .combine = 'rbind',
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'base_dir_masked', 'pgs_baseline', 'pop', 'prop', 'n_iterations', 'n_boot_per_iter', 'n_downsample_target')
    ) %dopar% {
        
        # Load Phenotype
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait_val, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) return(NULL)
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Extract relevant PGS column for this trait from baseline
        pgs_cols <- names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) & grepl(trait_val, names(pgs_baseline))]
        
        trait_res_list <- list()
        
        for (param_val in pgs_cols) {
            pgs_base_sub <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            base_merged <- merge(pheno, pgs_base_sub, by='IID', sort=FALSE)
            n_full <- nrow(base_merged) # Capture the full sample size for this trait
            
            # --- ITERATION LOOP (Random Masking) ---
            # We will collect all 1000 bootstrap estimates (10 iters * 100 boots) for this trait/param
            boot_estimates_full <- list()
            boot_estimates_down <- list()
            
            for (iter in 1:n_iterations) {
                masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.random.prop_', prop, '.iteration_', iter, '.sscore')
                if (!file.exists(masked_file)) next
                
                pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
                if (!param_val %in% names(pgs_masked)) next
                
                pgs_mask_sub <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
                full_data <- merge(base_merged, pgs_mask_sub, by='IID', suffixes=c("", "_masked"))
                
                # Define data subsets to analyze
                analysis_sets <- list(list(type="Full", data=full_data))
                
                # --- INDIVIDUAL BOOTSTRAP LOOP ---
                for (aset in analysis_sets) {
                    df <- aset$data
                    n_curr <- nrow(df)
                    if (n_curr < 10) next 
                    
                    # PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Extract to basic vectors outside the loop
                    # Subsetting a data.table 100,000 times is memory-intensive. 
                    # Indexing numeric vectors directly is vastly faster.
                    y_vec <- df[['outcome']]
                    s_vec <- df[[param_val]]
                    sp_vec <- df[[paste0(param_val, "_masked")]]
                    
                    # Bootstrap individuals n_boot_per_iter times
                    boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot_per_iter, {
                        idx <- sample(n_curr, n_curr, replace=TRUE)
                        
                        # Use vector indexing instead of data.table subsetting
                        y <- y_vec[idx]
                        s <- s_vec[idx]
                        s_prime <- sp_vec[idx]
                        
                        r2_s <- cor(y, s)^2
                        r2_s_prime <- cor(y, s_prime)^2
                        
                        # Variances
                        var_s <- var(s)
                        var_s_prime <- var(s_prime)
                        rel_var_obs <- var_s_prime / var_s
                        
                        # Slopes
                        slope_base <- cov(y, s) / var_s
                        slope_mask <- cov(y, s_prime) / var_s_prime
                        
                        # Handle extremely low baseline R2 safely
                        obs_rel_r2 <- if(r2_s > 1e-8) r2_s_prime / r2_s else NA
                        est_rel_r2 <- cor(s, s_prime)^2 
                        
                        error_val <- est_rel_r2 - obs_rel_r2
                        abs_error_val <- abs(error_val)
                        
                        # Rescaled Slope (Calibration Factor = sqrt(Relative R2 / Relative Variance))
                        cf <- sqrt(est_rel_r2 / rel_var_obs)
                        slope_rescaled <- if (!is.na(cf) && cf > 1e-8) slope_mask / cf else NA
                        
                        # Slope Ratios
                        slope_ratio_uncalib <- if (!is.na(slope_base) && abs(slope_base) > 1e-8) slope_mask / slope_base else NA
                        slope_ratio_calib <- if (!is.na(slope_base) && abs(slope_base) > 1e-8 && !is.na(slope_rescaled)) slope_rescaled / slope_base else NA
                        
                        c(obs_rel_r2, est_rel_r2, error_val, abs_error_val,
                          var_s, var_s_prime, rel_var_obs,
                          slope_base, slope_mask, slope_rescaled,
                          slope_ratio_uncalib, slope_ratio_calib, r2_s, r2_s_prime)
                    })
                    
                    # Store bootstrap results
                    # boot_stats is a matrix of 12 rows x 100 cols
                    if (aset$type == "Full") {
                        boot_estimates_full[[iter]] <- t(boot_stats)
                    } else {
                        boot_estimates_down[[iter]] <- t(boot_stats)
                    }
                } 
            } # End Iteration Loop
            
            # --- SUMMARIZE ALL 1000 BOOTSTRAPS FOR THIS TRAIT ---
            process_bootstraps <- function(boot_list, type_label, n_samples_val) {
                if (length(boot_list) == 0) return(NULL)
                
                # Combine all 100 matrices into one 1000x12 matrix
                all_boots <- do.call(rbind, boot_list)
                all_boots <- all_boots[complete.cases(all_boots), , drop=FALSE] # Remove NAs from low R2
                
                if (nrow(all_boots) == 0) return(NULL)
                
                means <- colMeans(all_boots)
                cis <- apply(all_boots, 2, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975))
                
                data.table(
                    population = pop,
                    trait = trait_val,
                    param = param_val,
                    pgs_method = ifelse(grepl('sbayesrc', param_val, ignore.case=T), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump'),
                    prop_missing = prop,
                    sample_type = type_label,
                    n_samples = n_samples_val,
                    total_bootstraps = nrow(all_boots),
                    
                    obs_rel_r2 = means[1],
                    obs_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 1],
                    obs_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 1],

                    est_rel_r2 = means[2],
                    est_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 2],
                    est_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 2],
                    
                    error = means[3],
                    error_low = cis[1, 3],
                    error_high = cis[2, 3],
                    
                    mad = means[4],
                    mad_low = cis[1, 4],
                    mad_high = cis[2, 4],
                    
                    # Newly added metrics
                    mean_var_base = means[5],
                    var_base_low = cis[1, 5],
                    var_base_high = cis[2, 5],
                    
                    mean_var_mask = means[6],
                    var_mask_low = cis[1, 6],
                    var_mask_high = cis[2, 6],
                    
                    mean_rel_var_obs = means[7],
                    rel_var_obs_low = cis[1, 7],
                    rel_var_obs_high = cis[2, 7],
                    
                    mean_slope_base = means[8],
                    slope_base_low = cis[1, 8],
                    slope_base_high = cis[2, 8],
                    
                    mean_slope_mask = means[9],
                    slope_mask_low = cis[1, 9],
                    slope_mask_high = cis[2, 9],
                    
                    mean_slope_rescaled = means[10],
                    slope_rescaled_low = cis[1, 10],
                    slope_rescaled_high = cis[2, 10],
                    
                    mean_slope_ratio_uncalib = means[11],
                    slope_ratio_uncalib_low = cis[1, 11],
                    slope_ratio_uncalib_high = cis[2, 11],
                    
                    mean_slope_ratio_calib = means[12],
                    slope_ratio_calib_low = cis[1, 12],
                    slope_ratio_calib_high = cis[2, 12],
                    
                    mean_r2_base = means[13],
                    r2_base_low = cis[1, 13],
                    r2_base_high = cis[2, 13],
                    
                    mean_r2_mask = means[14],
                    r2_mask_low = cis[1, 14],
                    r2_mask_high = cis[2, 14]
                )
            }

            res_full <- process_bootstraps(boot_estimates_full, "Full", n_full)
            res_down <- process_bootstraps(boot_estimates_down, "Downsampled", n_down)
            
            trait_res_list[[length(trait_res_list) + 1]] <- rbind(res_full, res_down)
        }
        return(rbindlist(trait_res_list))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(trait_results_list)) {
        final_results_list[[length(final_results_list) + 1]] <- trait_results_list
    }
  }
}

# Combine all trait-level summaries
results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_mvp_sparse_results_10it_random.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_mvp_sparse_results_10it_random.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

### INFO-based masking

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_mvp_gwas.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_mvp_gwas.tar
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# Populations to analyze
populations <- c('EUR') 
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')

# File paths
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# Simulation parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5) # Proportions of missingness
n_boot <- 10              # Bootstraps of INDIVIDUALS 

set.seed(123)

# List to collect results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. OUTER LOOP: POPULATIONS ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Check baseline file existence
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.sscore')
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping baseline not found:", baseline_file))
        next
    }
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[, !grepl('AVG', names(pgs_baseline)), with = F]
    
    # --- 3. INNER LOOP: TRAITS (Parallel) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait_val = traits,
        .combine = 'rbind',
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'base_dir_masked', 'pgs_baseline', 'pop', 'prop', 'n_boot')
    ) %dopar% {
        
        # Load Phenotype
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait_val, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) return(NULL)
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Extract relevant PGS column for this trait from baseline
        pgs_cols <- names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) & grepl(trait_val, names(pgs_baseline))]
        
        trait_res_list <- list()
        
        for (param_val in pgs_cols) {
            pgs_base_sub <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            base_merged <- merge(pheno, pgs_base_sub, by='IID', sort=FALSE)
            
            # --- INFO MASKING (Single File, Deterministic) ---
            masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
            if (!file.exists(masked_file)) next
            
            pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
            if (!param_val %in% names(pgs_masked)) next
            
            pgs_mask_sub <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            full_data <- merge(base_merged, pgs_mask_sub, by='IID', suffixes=c("", "_masked"))
            
            n_curr <- nrow(full_data)
            if (n_curr < 10) next 
            
            # PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Extract to basic vectors outside the loop
            y_vec <- full_data[['outcome']]
            s_vec <- full_data[[param_val]]
            sp_vec <- full_data[[paste0(param_val, "_masked")]]
            
            # --- INDIVIDUAL BOOTSTRAP LOOP ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                idx <- sample(n_curr, n_curr, replace=TRUE)
                
                # Use vector indexing instead of data.table subsetting
                y <- y_vec[idx]
                s <- s_vec[idx]
                s_prime <- sp_vec[idx]
                
                r2_s <- cor(y, s)^2
                r2_s_prime <- cor(y, s_prime)^2
                
                var_s <- var(s)
                var_s_prime <- var(s_prime)
                rel_var_obs <- var_s_prime / var_s
                
                # Handle extremely low baseline R2 safely
                obs_rel_r2 <- if(r2_s > 1e-8) r2_s_prime / r2_s else NA
                est_rel_r2 <- cor(s, s_prime)^2 
                
                error_val <- est_rel_r2 - obs_rel_r2
                abs_error_val <- abs(error_val)
                
                c(obs_rel_r2, est_rel_r2, error_val, abs_error_val, r2_s, r2_s_prime, var_s, var_s_prime, rel_var_obs)
            })
            
            # Transpose and remove failures (NAs)
            boot_stats <- t(boot_stats)
            boot_stats <- boot_stats[complete.cases(boot_stats), , drop=FALSE]
            
            if (nrow(boot_stats) == 0) next
            
            # Summarize the distribution
            means <- colMeans(boot_stats)
            cis <- apply(boot_stats, 2, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975))
            
            trait_res_list[[length(trait_res_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                population = pop,
                trait = trait_val,
                param = param_val,
                pgs_method = ifelse(grepl('sbayesrc', param_val, ignore.case=T), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump'),
                prop_missing = prop,
                n_samples = n_curr,
                total_bootstraps = nrow(boot_stats),
                
                obs_rel_r2 = means[1],
                obs_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 1],
                obs_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 1],

                est_rel_r2 = means[2],
                est_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 2],
                est_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 2],
                
                error = means[3],
                error_low = cis[1, 3],
                error_high = cis[2, 3],
                
                mad = means[4],
                mad_low = cis[1, 4],
                mad_high = cis[2, 4],
                
                mean_r2_base = means[5],
                r2_base_low = cis[1, 5],
                r2_base_high = cis[2, 5],
                
                mean_r2_mask = means[6],
                r2_mask_low = cis[1, 6],
                r2_mask_high = cis[2, 6],
                
                mean_var_base = means[7],
                var_base_low = cis[1, 7],
                var_base_high = cis[2, 7],
                
                mean_var_mask = means[8],
                var_mask_low = cis[1, 8],
                var_mask_high = cis[2, 8],
                
                mean_rel_var_obs = means[9],
                rel_var_obs_low = cis[1, 9],
                rel_var_obs_high = cis[2, 9]
            )
        }
        return(rbindlist(trait_res_list))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(trait_results_list)) {
        final_results_list[[length(final_results_list) + 1]] <- trait_results_list
    }
  }
}

# Combine all trait-level summaries
results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_mvp_sparse_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_mvp_sparse_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

### INFO-based masking (sqrt_info correction)

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_mvp_gwas_sqrtinfo.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_mvp_gwas_sqrtinfo.tar
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# Populations to analyze
populations <- c('EUR') 
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')

# File paths
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# Simulation parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5) # Proportions of missingness
n_boot <- 10              # Bootstraps of INDIVIDUALS 

set.seed(123)

# List to collect results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. OUTER LOOP: POPULATIONS ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Check baseline file existence
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse_sqrt_info_pre.sscore')
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping baseline not found:", baseline_file))
        next
    }
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[, !grepl('AVG', names(pgs_baseline)), with = F]
    
    # --- 3. INNER LOOP: TRAITS (Parallel) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait_val = traits,
        .combine = 'rbind',
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'base_dir_masked', 'pgs_baseline', 'pop', 'prop', 'n_boot')
    ) %dopar% {
        
        # Load Phenotype
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait_val, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) return(NULL)
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Extract relevant PGS column for this trait from baseline
        pgs_cols <- names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) & grepl(trait_val, names(pgs_baseline))]
        
        trait_res_list <- list()
        
        for (param_val in pgs_cols) {
            pgs_base_sub <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            base_merged <- merge(pheno, pgs_base_sub, by='IID', sort=FALSE)
            
            # --- INFO MASKING (Single File, Deterministic) ---
            masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse_sqrt_info_pre.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
            if (!file.exists(masked_file)) next
            
            pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
            if (!param_val %in% names(pgs_masked)) next
            
            pgs_mask_sub <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            full_data <- merge(base_merged, pgs_mask_sub, by='IID', suffixes=c("", "_masked"))
            
            n_curr <- nrow(full_data)
            if (n_curr < 10) next 
            
            # PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Extract to basic vectors outside the loop
            y_vec <- full_data[['outcome']]
            s_vec <- full_data[[param_val]]
            sp_vec <- full_data[[paste0(param_val, "_masked")]]
            
            # --- INDIVIDUAL BOOTSTRAP LOOP ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                idx <- sample(n_curr, n_curr, replace=TRUE)
                
                # Use vector indexing instead of data.table subsetting
                y <- y_vec[idx]
                s <- s_vec[idx]
                s_prime <- sp_vec[idx]
                
                r2_s <- cor(y, s)^2
                r2_s_prime <- cor(y, s_prime)^2
                
                var_s <- var(s)
                var_s_prime <- var(s_prime)
                rel_var_obs <- var_s_prime / var_s
                
                # Handle extremely low baseline R2 safely
                obs_rel_r2 <- if(r2_s > 1e-8) r2_s_prime / r2_s else NA
                est_rel_r2 <- cor(s, s_prime)^2 
                
                error_val <- est_rel_r2 - obs_rel_r2
                abs_error_val <- abs(error_val)
                
                c(obs_rel_r2, est_rel_r2, error_val, abs_error_val, r2_s, r2_s_prime, var_s, var_s_prime, rel_var_obs)
            })
            
            # Transpose and remove failures (NAs)
            boot_stats <- t(boot_stats)
            boot_stats <- boot_stats[complete.cases(boot_stats), , drop=FALSE]
            
            if (nrow(boot_stats) == 0) next
            
            # Summarize the distribution
            means <- colMeans(boot_stats)
            cis <- apply(boot_stats, 2, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975))
            
            trait_res_list[[length(trait_res_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                population = pop,
                trait = trait_val,
                param = param_val,
                pgs_method = ifelse(grepl('sbayesrc', param_val, ignore.case=T), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump'),
                prop_missing = prop,
                n_samples = n_curr,
                total_bootstraps = nrow(boot_stats),
                
                obs_rel_r2 = means[1],
                obs_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 1],
                obs_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 1],

                est_rel_r2 = means[2],
                est_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 2],
                est_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 2],
                
                error = means[3],
                error_low = cis[1, 3],
                error_high = cis[2, 3],
                
                mad = means[4],
                mad_low = cis[1, 4],
                mad_high = cis[2, 4],
                
                mean_r2_base = means[5],
                r2_base_low = cis[1, 5],
                r2_base_high = cis[2, 5],
                
                mean_r2_mask = means[6],
                r2_mask_low = cis[1, 6],
                r2_mask_high = cis[2, 6],
                
                mean_var_base = means[7],
                var_base_low = cis[1, 7],
                var_base_high = cis[2, 7],
                
                mean_var_mask = means[8],
                var_mask_low = cis[1, 8],
                var_mask_high = cis[2, 8],
                
                mean_rel_var_obs = means[9],
                rel_var_obs_low = cis[1, 9],
                rel_var_obs_high = cis[2, 9]
            )
        }
        return(rbindlist(trait_res_list))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(trait_results_list)) {
        final_results_list[[length(final_results_list) + 1]] <- trait_results_list
    }
  }
}

# Combine all trait-level summaries
results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_mvp_sparse_sqrt_info_pre_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_mvp_sparse_sqrt_info_pre_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***

### INFO-based masking (INFO > 0.9)

```{bash}
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_baseline_mvp_gwas_rsq_90.tar
tar -xvf /mnt/project/mind_the_gap/pgs_wgs_sparse_masked_mvp_gwas_rsq_90.tar
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(stringr)
library(foreach)
library(doMC)
registerDoMC(8)

# Populations to analyze
populations <- c('EUR') 
traits <- c('HT', 'HB', 'PLT', 'BMI', 'BWT', 'MCHC', 'SBP', 'NEU', 'HDL', 'TC')

# File paths
base_dir_baseline <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/baseline/'
base_dir_masked <- '~/pgs_wgs/sparse/masked/'
pheno_dir <- '/mnt/project/mind_the_gap/phenotype/'

# Simulation parameters
props <- c(0.05, 0.25, 0.5) # Proportions of missingness
n_boot <- 10              # Bootstraps of INDIVIDUALS 

set.seed(123)

# List to collect results
final_results_list <- list()

# --- 2. OUTER LOOP: POPULATIONS ---
for (pop in populations) {
    print(paste("Processing Population:", pop))
  
  for (prop in props) {
    print(paste("Processing prop:", prop))
    
    # Check baseline file existence
    baseline_file <- paste0(base_dir_baseline, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse_rsq_90.sscore')
    if (!file.exists(baseline_file)) {
        print(paste("Skipping baseline not found:", baseline_file))
        next
    }
    pgs_baseline <- fread(baseline_file)
    pgs_baseline <- pgs_baseline[, !grepl('AVG', names(pgs_baseline)), with = F]
    
    # --- 3. INNER LOOP: TRAITS (Parallel) ---
    trait_results_list <- foreach(
        trait_val = traits,
        .combine = 'rbind',
        .packages = 'data.table',
        .export = c('pheno_dir', 'base_dir_masked', 'pgs_baseline', 'pop', 'prop', 'n_boot')
    ) %dopar% {
        
        # Load Phenotype
        pheno_file <- paste0(pheno_dir, trait_val, '.', pop, '.txt')
        if (!file.exists(pheno_file)) return(NULL)
        pheno <- fread(pheno_file)

        # Extract relevant PGS column for this trait from baseline
        pgs_cols <- names(pgs_baseline)[grepl('SUM', names(pgs_baseline)) & grepl(trait_val, names(pgs_baseline))]
        
        trait_res_list <- list()
        
        for (param_val in pgs_cols) {
            pgs_base_sub <- pgs_baseline[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            base_merged <- merge(pheno, pgs_base_sub, by='IID', sort=FALSE)
            
            # --- INFO MASKING (Single File, Deterministic) ---
            masked_file <- paste0(base_dir_masked, 'ukb.', pop, '.sparse_rsq_90.prop_', prop, '.sscore')
            if (!file.exists(masked_file)) next
            
            pgs_masked <- fread(masked_file)
            if (!param_val %in% names(pgs_masked)) next
            
            pgs_mask_sub <- pgs_masked[, c('IID', param_val), with=FALSE]
            full_data <- merge(base_merged, pgs_mask_sub, by='IID', suffixes=c("", "_masked"))
            
            n_curr <- nrow(full_data)
            if (n_curr < 10) next 
            
            # PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATION: Extract to basic vectors outside the loop
            y_vec <- full_data[['outcome']]
            s_vec <- full_data[[param_val]]
            sp_vec <- full_data[[paste0(param_val, "_masked")]]
            
            # --- INDIVIDUAL BOOTSTRAP LOOP ---
            boot_stats <- replicate(n_boot, {
                idx <- sample(n_curr, n_curr, replace=TRUE)
                
                # Use vector indexing instead of data.table subsetting
                y <- y_vec[idx]
                s <- s_vec[idx]
                s_prime <- sp_vec[idx]
                
                r2_s <- cor(y, s)^2
                r2_s_prime <- cor(y, s_prime)^2
                
                var_s <- var(s)
                var_s_prime <- var(s_prime)
                rel_var_obs <- var_s_prime / var_s
                
                # Handle extremely low baseline R2 safely
                obs_rel_r2 <- if(r2_s > 1e-8) r2_s_prime / r2_s else NA
                est_rel_r2 <- cor(s, s_prime)^2 
                
                error_val <- est_rel_r2 - obs_rel_r2
                abs_error_val <- abs(error_val)
                
                c(obs_rel_r2, est_rel_r2, error_val, abs_error_val, r2_s, r2_s_prime, var_s, var_s_prime, rel_var_obs)
            })
            
            # Transpose and remove failures (NAs)
            boot_stats <- t(boot_stats)
            boot_stats <- boot_stats[complete.cases(boot_stats), , drop=FALSE]
            
            if (nrow(boot_stats) == 0) next
            
            # Summarize the distribution
            means <- colMeans(boot_stats)
            cis <- apply(boot_stats, 2, quantile, probs=c(0.025, 0.975))
            
            trait_res_list[[length(trait_res_list) + 1]] <- data.table(
                population = pop,
                trait = trait_val,
                param = param_val,
                pgs_method = ifelse(grepl('sbayesrc', param_val, ignore.case=T), 'SBayesRC', 'pT+clump'),
                prop_missing = prop,
                n_samples = n_curr,
                total_bootstraps = nrow(boot_stats),
                
                obs_rel_r2 = means[1],
                obs_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 1],
                obs_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 1],

                est_rel_r2 = means[2],
                est_rel_r2_low = cis[1, 2],
                est_rel_r2_high = cis[2, 2],
                
                error = means[3],
                error_low = cis[1, 3],
                error_high = cis[2, 3],
                
                mad = means[4],
                mad_low = cis[1, 4],
                mad_high = cis[2, 4],
                
                mean_r2_base = means[5],
                r2_base_low = cis[1, 5],
                r2_base_high = cis[2, 5],
                
                mean_r2_mask = means[6],
                r2_mask_low = cis[1, 6],
                r2_mask_high = cis[2, 6],
                
                mean_var_base = means[7],
                var_base_low = cis[1, 7],
                var_base_high = cis[2, 7],
                
                mean_var_mask = means[8],
                var_mask_low = cis[1, 8],
                var_mask_high = cis[2, 8],
                
                mean_rel_var_obs = means[9],
                rel_var_obs_low = cis[1, 9],
                rel_var_obs_high = cis[2, 9]
            )
        }
        return(rbindlist(trait_res_list))
    }
    
    if (!is.null(trait_results_list)) {
        final_results_list[[length(final_results_list) + 1]] <- trait_results_list
    }
  }
}

# Combine all trait-level summaries
results_dt <- rbindlist(final_results_list)

write.csv(results_dt, '~/wgs_mvp_sparse_rsq_90_results.csv', row.names=F)
system('dx upload ~/wgs_mvp_sparse_rsq_90_results.csv --path mind_the_gap/results/')

```

***
